CIPHER.1084.cipherString: My father followed, during most of his life, the precarious occupation of a country school teacher.
CIPHER.1084.question: A phrase by Simon Newcomb has been encoded using the Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1084.author: Simon Newcomb

CIPHER.1085.cipherString: So go on and play, and if you make a mistake, make it loud so you won't make it next time.
CIPHER.1085.question: The marching band's sheet music rearranged itself into this pattern—it's a quote by Art Blakey encoded as an Atbash cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1085.author: Art Blakey

CIPHER.1086.cipherString: What lies beyond fear is freedom - have the courage to step forward and unlock your potential.
CIPHER.1086.question: Astronomers notice this repeating sequence in deep-space data. It's actually a quote by Felecia Etienne, encoded with an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.1086.author: Felecia Etienne

CIPHER.1087.cipherString: For every minute you remain angry, you give up sixty seconds of peace of mind.
CIPHER.1087.question: Someone left a paper with the message below on the copy machine in the office. It's a quote by Ralph Waldo Emerson, encoded as a Porta using a keyword of ANNOY. What does it say?
CIPHER.1087.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

CIPHER.1088.cipherString: Night had come on like the closing of a great but gentle eye.
CIPHER.1088.question: While repairing an old telescope, you find a note hidden in the tube. The message is a quote by Ray Bradbury written in a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of SLEEP and polybius key of DARKNESS. What does it say?
CIPHER.1088.author: Ray Bradbury

CIPHER.1089.cipherString: I was going to share a vegetable joke but it's corny.
CIPHER.1089.question: The following symbols encode a sentence using a Baconian alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.1089.author: Unknown

CIPHER.1090.cipherString: The best job goes to the person who can get it done without passing the buck or coming back with excuses.
CIPHER.1090.question: Napoleon Hill offers an observation that has been encoded as a Caesar cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1090.author: Napoleon Hill

CIPHER.1091.cipherString: Mere goodness can achieve little against the power of nature.
CIPHER.1091.question: You found the following carved into the bark of a hollow log. You are told that it's a quote by Georg Wilhelm Friedrich Hegel encoded as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword length of 5. The 5th through 15th cipher units (25 46 38 26 72 43 75 67 46 64 32) decode to be GOODNESSCAN. What does it say?
CIPHER.1091.author: Georg Wilhelm Friedrich Hegel

CIPHER.1092.cipherString: You can pretend to be serious but you can't pretend to be witty.
CIPHER.1092.question: Solve this quote by Sacha Guitry that has been encoded using the Fractionated Morse Cipher.  You are told that the quote has D TO BE WI in it corresponding to the encoded text B S X J Z M U R N B, meaning B = ●×–; J = –––; M = ●●●; N = –×●; R = ×●–; S = ●●×; U = ×●×; X = ×–×; Z = ××–. What does it say?
CIPHER.1092.author: Sacha Guitry

CIPHER.1093.question: Upon searching a room, the following were found on scraps of paper. You are told it's a quote by Plutarch encoded as a Baconian. You are told that the cipher text HERE A NASTY MAGIC SHACK decodes to be SIMP. What does it say?
CIPHER.1093.author: Plutarch

CIPHER.1094.cipherString: Estas cartas parecen mágicas, ya que siempre ayudan a resolver malentendidos y formar amistades.
CIPHER.1094.question: This is from the back of the Spanish-language edition of the book The Lonely Mailman. It has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt with an English keyword. What does it say?

CIPHER.1095.cipherString: His voice stuck fast in his throat.
CIPHER.1095.question: The following quote needs to be decoded with the Affine Cipher with a=15 and b=3. What does it say?

CIPHER.1096.cipherString: My desire is... that my adversary had written a book.
CIPHER.1096.question: An explorer's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote, written in a Baconian Cipher. What does it say?

CIPHER.1097.cipherString: I would rather my students drink knowledge from a running stream than a stagnant pool
CIPHER.1097.question: During a field trip, you notice these strange markings on a metal plaque. They represent a quote by Howard Hendricks, encoded using a Checkerboard Cipher with a polybius key of TREMENDOUSNESS. What does it say?
CIPHER.1097.author: Howard Hendricks

CIPHER.1098.cipherString: Burnout prevention starts with you. Invest in your happiness and well-being for a better tomorrow.
CIPHER.1098.question: Your smart fridge started flashing this cryptic message at 3 a.m. It's by Felecia Etienne encoded as an Aristocrat cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1098.author: Felecia Etienne

CIPHER.1099.question: Your graphing calculator won’t stop displaying this Cryptarithm puzzle. What do the values 500548 355329 decode to?

CIPHER.1100.cipherString: Much reading is like much eating, wholly useless without digestion.
CIPHER.1100.question: Found inside a dissected frog's stomach (plastic, don’t worry): this Atbash note. What does it say?

CIPHER.1101.cipherString: One dog can drive a flock of sheep.
CIPHER.1101.question: The hallway banner changes daily to a proverb encoded as an Affine cipher. You are told that the cipher text BY decodes to be OF. What does it say?
CIPHER.1101.author: Proverb

CIPHER.1102.cipherString: We must join with the tens of millions all over the world who see in peace our most sacred responsibility.
CIPHER.1102.question: This code is found written in chalk on the sidewalk outside the science building. It's a quote by Paul Robeson, written in a Caesar Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1102.author: Paul Robeson

CIPHER.1103.cipherString: El pequeño pueblo se llena de hombres de traje negro que creen que en las montañas se esconden unos seres peligrosos.
CIPHER.1103.question: This is part of the plot of the book En Busca de la Entrada Secreta 2. It has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt for you to solve.

CIPHER.1104.question: Someone left this coded message in the school lab. You are told it's actually words, encoded as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 126970269 26306 decode to?

CIPHER.1105.cipherString: Wildflowers cannot be controlled, and neither can the girl with a soul boundless as the sky, and a spirit as free and wild as the ocean.
CIPHER.1105.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote by Melody Lee, written in a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains A SOUL corresponding to the ciphertext letters RMBKZ in the middle of the second line. What does it say?
CIPHER.1105.author: Melody Lee

CIPHER.1106.cipherString: The view is particularly remarkable and there is enough here to paint for a lifetime.
CIPHER.1106.question: This coded passage was discovered behind the frame of an old painting. It's a quote by Claude Monet, encrypted as a Complete Columnar. The quote has TO PAINT somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1106.author: Claude Monet

CIPHER.1107.cipherString: Every number is at once half the sum of the two on either side of itself...
CIPHER.1107.question: While debugging a program, you find this hidden in the comments. It's a quote by Nicomachus, encrypted as a Porta. The 30th through 34th cipher characters (MUGZN) decode to be OFTHE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1107.author: Nicomachus

CIPHER.1108.cipherString: Today I know that physical training should have as much place in the curriculum as mental training.
CIPHER.1108.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Aristocrat encoded quote about school. What does it say?

CIPHER.1109.cipherString: No animal should ever jump up on the dining room furniture unless absolutely certain that he can hold his own in the conversation.
CIPHER.1109.question: A vending machine just dispensed a candy wrapper with this K1 Patristocrat code by Fran Lebowitz, which turns out to be a quote about pets. You are told that the cipher contains UNLES corresponding with the ciphertext letters IJWPA. What does it say?
CIPHER.1109.author: Fran Lebowitz

CIPHER.1110.cipherString: Loveliest of trees, the cherry now Is hung with bloom along the bough.
CIPHER.1110.question: A mysterious balloon release at the science fair carried this Checkerboard banner by A. E. Housman. The 26th through 34th cipher units (BL BE BR NX UX NA OL BL NL) decode to be NOWISHUNG. What does it say?
CIPHER.1110.author: A. E. Housman

CIPHER.1111.cipherString: If the world acts together, we can make sure that all of our children enjoy lives of opportunity and dignity.
CIPHER.1111.question: A message by Barack Obama encrypted with the Aristocrat Cipher has been received. What does it say?
CIPHER.1111.author: Barack Obama

CIPHER.1112.cipherString: Normally, I name my characters after famous comedians.
CIPHER.1112.question: A time-capsule USB drive from 1983 just auto-opened with this Fractionated Morse-encrypted message by author Paula Danziger.  You are told that the quote has COME in it corresponding to the encoded text Z I W Q P V, meaning I = ●–●; P = –×●; Q = –×–; V = ×–●; W = ×––; Z = ××–. What does it say?
CIPHER.1112.author: Paula Danziger

CIPHER.1113.cipherString: Courage of soul is necessary for the triumphs of genius.
CIPHER.1113.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote, encrypted using the Complete Columnar cipher. The quote has TRIUMPHS somewhere in it. What does it say?
